revision.comment: transittion complete - sport parameter no longer used using [[Project:AWB|AWB]]
naval ensign is standard flag; remove naval jack
Technicaly correct, but the football community generally leaves it as 'Netherlands'
Undo, thought i was on a different page
update to new documentation style. Also remove shortname alias - this breaks lots of things! - use {{flag|The Netherlands}} instead as per doc
update to use new documentation method using [[Project:AutoWikiBrowser|AWB]]

revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Netherlands | flag alias = Flag of the Netherlands.svg | alt attribute = Flag of the Netherlands | flag alias-pri = Prinsenvlag.svg | link alias-naval = Royal Netherlands Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = pri | redir1 = NLD | redir2 = NED | redir3 = The Netherlands </noinclude> }}<noinclude> [[af:Sjabloon:Landdata Nederland]] [[ml:ഫലകം:Country data Netherlands]] [[sl:Predloga:Podatki države Nizozemska]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Protected Template:Country data Netherlands: high-risk template [edit=sysop:move=sysop]
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Netherlands | flag alias = Flag of the Netherlands.svg | alt attribute = Flag of the Netherlands | flag alias-pri = Prinsenvlag.svg | link alias-naval = Royal Netherlands Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = pri | redir1 = NLD | redir2 = NED | redir3 = The Netherlands </noinclude> }}<noinclude> [[af:Sjabloon:Landdata Nederland]] [[ml:ഫലകം:Country data Netherlands]] [[sl:Predloga:Podatki države Nizozemska]] </noinclude>

<noinclude>{{pp-template}}</noinclude> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Netherlands | flag alias = Flag of the Netherlands.svg | alt attribute = Flag of the Netherlands | flag alias-pri = Prinsenvlag.svg | link alias-naval = Royal Netherlands Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = pri | redir1 = NLD | redir2 = NED | redir3 = The Netherlands </noinclude> }}<noinclude> [[af:Sjabloon:Landdata Nederland]] [[ml:ഫലകം:Country data Netherlands]] [[sl:Predloga:Podatki države Nizozemska]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/East718|East718]] ([[User talk:East718|talk]]) to last version by SnakeBot
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Netherlands | flag alias = Flag of the Netherlands.svg | alt attribute = Flag of the Netherlands | flag alias-pri = Prinsenvlag.svg | link alias-naval = Royal Netherlands Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = pri | redir1 = NLD | redir2 = NED | redir3 = The Netherlands </noinclude> }}<noinclude> [[af:Sjabloon:Landdata Nederland]] [[ml:ഫലകം:Country data Netherlands]] [[sl:Predloga:Podatki države Nizozemska]] </noinclude>

{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Netherlands | flag alias = Flag of the Netherlands.svg | alt attribute = Flag of the Netherlands | flag alias-pri = Prinsenvlag.svg | flag alias-air force = NL-VLAG-Luchtmacht.svg | link alias-air force = Royal Netherlands Air Force | flag alias-naval = Naval Jack of the Netherlands.svg | link alias-naval = Royal Netherlands Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | related1 = Dutch Republic | var1 = pri | var2 = naval | var3 = air force | redir1 = NLD | redir2 = NED | redir3 = The Netherlands </noinclude> }}<noinclude> [[af:Sjabloon:Landdata Nederland]] [[ml:ഫലകം:Country data Netherlands]] [[sl:Predloga:Podatki države Nizozemska]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: remove naval jack; correct flag for [[Template:Navy]] is the naval ensign, which is also the national flag
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Netherlands | flag alias = Flag of the Netherlands.svg | alt attribute = Flag of the Netherlands | flag alias-pri = Prinsenvlag.svg | flag alias-air force = NL-VLAG-Luchtmacht.svg | link alias-air force = Royal Netherlands Air Force | link alias-naval = Royal Netherlands Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | related1 = Dutch Republic | var1 = pri | redir1 = NLD | redir2 = NED | redir3 = The Netherlands </noinclude> }}<noinclude> [[af:Sjabloon:Landdata Nederland]] [[ml:ഫലകം:Country data Netherlands]] [[sl:Predloga:Podatki države Nizozemska]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: remove "pri" variant - all transclusions replaced with [[Template:Country data Dutch Republic]]
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Netherlands | flag alias = Flag of the Netherlands.svg | alt attribute = Flag of the Netherlands | flag alias-air force = NL-VLAG-Luchtmacht.svg | link alias-air force = Royal Netherlands Air Force | link alias-naval = Royal Netherlands Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | related1 = Dutch Republic | redir1 = NLD | redir2 = NED | redir3 = The Netherlands </noinclude> }}<noinclude> [[af:Sjabloon:Landdata Nederland]] [[ml:ഫലകം:Country data Netherlands]] [[sl:Predloga:Podatki države Nizozemska]] </noinclude>

{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Netherlands | flag alias = Flag of the Netherlands.svg | flag alias-air force = NL-VLAG-Luchtmacht.svg | link alias-air force = Royal Netherlands Air Force | link alias-naval = Royal Netherlands Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | redir1 = NLD | redir2 = NED | redir3 = The Netherlands | related1 = Kingdom of the Netherlands | related2 Dutch Republic </noinclude> }}<noinclude> [[af:Sjabloon:Landdata Nederland]] [[ml:ഫലകം:Country data Netherlands]] [[sl:Predloga:Podatki države Nizozemska]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: remove unused air force image & link, move interwiki to /doc
naval *ensigns* used with these templates, not naval *jacks*
flag is used in both roles, see [[Flag of the Netherlands]]
need to call it another variant name then; 'naval' used by ship templates etc. where naval ensigns are expected
Changed protection level of Template:Country data Netherlands: allow template editors to modify ([Edit=Protected template] (indefinite) [Move=Protected template] (indefinite))

revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Netherlands | flag alias = Flag of the Netherlands.svg | flag alias-prinsengeus = Naval Jack of the Netherlands.svg | flag alias-army =Flag of the Royal Netherlands Army.svg | flag alias-air force=Flag of the Royal Netherlands Air Force.svg | link alias-air force= Royal Netherlands Air Force | link alias-army= Royal Netherlands Army | link alias-naval = Royal Netherlands Navy | flag alias-marines = Naval Jack of the Netherlands.svg | link alias-marines = Netherlands Marine Corps | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = prinsengeus | redir1 = NLD | redir2 = NED | redir3 = The Netherlands | related1 = Kingdom of the Netherlands | related2 = Dutch Republic | related3 = Batavian Republic </noinclude> }}

{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Netherlands | flag alias = Flag of the Netherlands.svg | flag alias-prinsengeus = Naval Jack of the Netherlands.svg | flag alias-2000 = Flag of the Netherlands (WFB 2000).jpg | flag alias-army =Flag of the Royal Netherlands Army.svg | flag alias-air force=Flag of the Royal Netherlands Air Force.svg | link alias-air force= Royal Netherlands Air Force | link alias-army= Royal Netherlands Army | link alias-naval = Royal Netherlands Navy | flag alias-marines = Naval Jack of the Netherlands.svg | link alias-marines = Netherlands Marine Corps | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = prinsengeus | var2 = 2000 | redir1 = NLD | redir2 = NED | redir3 = The Netherlands | related1 = Kingdom of the Netherlands | related2 = Dutch Republic | related3 = Batavian Republic </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: no longer required - High use template is now in the documentation

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Netherlands here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
